profile: Otherworld Assault (Phys. Burst / LowHP Execute). Self-damage engine: all attacks consume 8% current HP and convert it into True DMG (Awaken), DMG taken becomes [Time Energy] that fuels [Inferno Trigger] — an AOE nuke that also deals % of target's current HP (execute) and recasts on kill. She WANTS to lose HP and scales hard with True DMG, %-current/max-HP execute damage, crit, and Final DMG. Wants damage amplifiers and HP-loss/execute synergy, NOT tank/heal/control/basic-attack effects.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: Her own mirror: +True DMG per [Time Seal] stack gained per HP lost — perfectly mirrors her HP-cost True-DMG engine. A → S at 3 where 10-stack [Time Seal] adds %-of-max-HP True DMG, doubling her execute identity.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks deal additional %-ATK True DMG — pure, unconditional True-DMG rider on a hero whose entire kit is True DMG; scales every Feat hit, Inferno hit and HP-cost proc. Useful from 0.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG + large conditional Final DMG and current-HP True DMG; even without Damage-Share targets the base Final DMG is strong, and 3 adds %-current-HP True DMG matching her execute pattern.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat +12%→30% Final DMG, no conditions — multiplies her whole burst (Feat + Inferno + HP-cost True DMG). Best generic damage mirror, anima ceiling.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: %-current-HP True DMG vs DoT targets, capped on her ATK — a strong execute rider; A not S only because it needs a DoT on the target, which her kit doesn't self-apply. Big with a DoT teammate.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Big front-loaded Final DMG that resets on kill — she kills and recasts Inferno on kill (Genesis V), so the reset keeps uptime high through her burst chains.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: +DMG for repeatedly hitting the same enemy in a turn — her Feat hits twice and Inferno hits again, and her burst focuses targets; clean multiplicative damage.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: On ally death: heal + large Crit Rate + Final DMG burst — she profits doubly from crit (Genesis V/execute) and Final DMG, and the heal feeds her HP-cost engine back up. Conditional on an ally dying.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Flat Crit Rate + Crit DMG — she self-buffs +24% crit on her Feat and rewards crits, so raw crit converts directly into damage; 3 adds a buff-dispel rider.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +ATK DMG vs debuffed enemies — her team/Inferno scenarios usually leave debuffs on targets; large, low-condition damage amp on a physical burst hero.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG per attack — her multi-hit Feat ramps it, but she is burst (few turns) so it caps slower than ideal; solid generic damage filler.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG + bonus vs shielded enemies; the base Final DMG always helps, the shield clause is situational.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG per buff on self — Genesis/Awaken give her several buffs (ATK and Final DMG from Time Energy), so it scales decently; pure damage.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG; 3 doubles the gain on Ultimate/Feat use — her core casts, so it ramps her burst. B (not A) because the ramp wants more turns than a burst hero gets.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Plain Final DMG% — a universally useful multiplier on her damage, but small (epic) numbers; reliable bench filler.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore raises her physical Feat/Inferno damage; doesn't touch her True DMG but still a real gain vs tanky targets.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat ATK% — her True-DMG and execute caps are ATK-based, so ATK scales nearly everything she does; small numbers keep it filler.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Extra True DMG on Feat-skill crit — her Feat is a crit-buffed Feat skill, so this triggers; B because it's only her Feat, not Inferno or HP-cost procs.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: True DMG on Basic Attack (and crit). She rarely basic-attacks (only the Awaken auto-BATK on HP loss), so most value is wasted; partial synergy via True-DMG theme only.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-target DMG scaling with target's lost HP — matches her execute/single-target burst, but only on single attacks, not her AOE Inferno.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Flat single-target ATK DMG — boosts her Feat focus, but does nothing for her AOE Inferno; decent but narrow.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Crit Rate% — she does crit, but the value is small (epic) and Alucard gives more; only fills empty slots.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Crit DMG% — useful since she crits, but small and second-string behind Alucard for crit synergy.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG + crit stacks that build only when she does NOT kill — anti-synergistic with a kill-chaining executor (Genesis V recasts on kill, removing the [Hunt] stacks).

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: True DMG only on passively-triggered AOE skills; her Inferno is an active-action nuke, so the trigger condition rarely matches — theme fits but the gate misfires.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: AOE-skill True DMG split among targets — her Inferno is AOE so it can fire, but the per-target cap is low against her single-target burst identity; marginal.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Big True DMG but gated on the target having [Infect], which she never applies; dead without an Infect teammate, hence C despite the True-DMG theme.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED — she does take/want damage (fuels Time Energy), so a little survivability isn't useless, but it adds no offense; bench only.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack DMG + on-kill basic attack at 3. She rarely basic-attacks, so most of it is dead; the on-kill BATK is minor for a True-DMG nuker. C even post-breakpoint.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack DMG + BATK crit — she is not a basic-attack hero, so the bulk of the mirror does nothing; near-dead synergy.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: Area-attack DMG only helps her Inferno, not her single-target Feat or HP-cost True DMG; partial, low-priority.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: ATK and DEF (and heal at 3) only while she carries a Shield — she has no self-shield, so it usually sits inactive; ATK part wasted without an enabler.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP + Healing-Received when low HP. She lives low HP and lifesteals, so heal-amp has slight synergy, but it's defensive with zero offense — filler at best.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP + DMG when her HP is higher than enemy's — directly anti-synergistic with her low-HP playstyle; the DMG clause rarely turns on.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Final DMG RED as she loses HP — the offensive half lines up with her low-HP play, but the numbers are small and it's a def mirror; modest.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP + AOE True DMG on a lethal hit. She already blocks the first fatal hit (Genesis IV) and rarely outright dies, so the retaliation seldom fires; mostly a stat stick.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Pure Final DMG RED — strong defensively but offers nothing to a burst executor; only if she must survive a specific spike.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Excess-DMG reduction — defensive only; ironically she WANTS to take damage to build Time Energy, so it can even slow her engine.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG RED on being hit — defensive, no offense, and softens the damage she converts into Time Energy; off-plan.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Flat HP% — pure survivability stat with no damage; she'd rather run damage in every slot.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Flat HP% (epic) — same as Albert but weaker; bench survivability only.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF% — minimal value on a low-DEF glass burst hero who wins by killing first.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Counter True DMG scaling off DEF — she has almost no DEF and isn't a tank that gets attacked; the True-DMG tag is wasted here.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED — defensive anti-crit utility; gives her no offense.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED (legendary) — defensive only; off-role for her burst plan.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Reflects [Bleed] when attacked — she neither tanks reliably nor wants Bleed; near-dead.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Reflects [Infect] when attacked — a control/tank mirror with no offense for her and a trigger she rarely meets.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG up — but her Inferno is largely fixed/True-DMG and split-capped, so a flat Ultimate-DMG% buff does little for its execute scaling; weak fit.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG boost built by basic attacks — she neither basic-attacks nor relies on a scalable Ultimate; double mismatch.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Small Final DMG + [Lethal] (blocks enemy revives). The Final DMG is minor and the control rider is niche utility, not her win condition; bench.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG only meaningful in Damage-Share state, which she doesn't enter; the unconditional Final DMG portion is tiny — mostly dead for her.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: DMG-RED/heal tank mirror keyed to Damage-Share — a guard kit she has nothing to do with; defensive and off-plan.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: On crit, reduce target Healing-Received — she crits, but this is a control debuff with no damage payoff for her; situational utility only.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: +DMG vs controlled enemies — she applies no control herself, so it only works behind a CC ally; conditional and off-kit.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate — she lands no debuffs that need accuracy; the stat is inert on her.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate — pure defensive anti-CC stat, zero offense; dead slot for a burst DPS.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate buff — survivability/anti-control only; contributes nothing to her damage.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + minor heal on buff expiry — defensive utility with no damage; off-role.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect-Hit/[Fox Fire] control package — she isn't a debuffer, so the engine never builds; wrong toolkit for her.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Extra [Bleed] on applying Bleed — she applies no Bleed, so it literally never triggers.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Extra [Infect] on applying Infect — she applies no Infect; dead trigger.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-skill True DMG per debuff on target — she stacks no debuffs herself, so the scaling stays near zero; theme fits but trigger doesn't.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases Heal output — she isn't a healer; the effect does nothing for her personal burst.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Single-target heal-skill amp — she has no heal skill to amplify; fully wasted.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Recover lost HP at turn start — directly counter to her HP-loss engine (less HP lost means fewer True-DMG stacks); anti-synergy plus zero offense.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Revive on death — she already has Genesis IV fatal-block + Inferno lifesteal, so a second revive is redundant and adds no damage.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Team Shield at battle start — a support effect with no personal damage; off-role for a solo executor.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: Grants allies Spirit Shield on her death — pure support payoff that requires her to die; nothing for her own burst.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: DMG-RED support mirror with no offensive text at all; defensive filler, dead for a damage hero.
